285.reason: [Incorrectly increments lineNum again after already incrementing it when encountering '\n', causing off-by-one error in line numbering for single-line comments]

reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-single: 0.5 , reason:  [Incorrectly increments lineNum again after already incrementing it when encountering '\n', causing off-by-one error in line numbering for single-line comments]

329.reason: [This handles unknown single-character symbols as ERROR with code 'a', but according to the problem, only standalone '&' or '|' should produce error type 'a'; other invalid symbols may need different handling or are not specified, but more critically, this logic does not specifically check for lone '&' or '|']
